title: ANF Roll Number Slip 2026 Download by CNIC | Test Date, Physical & Written Details
content:
ANF Roll Number Slip 2026 Download

Candidates who applied for ANF jobs 2026 must download their roll number slip before appearing in tests. This slip is required for physical test, written exam, and interview.

Overview

  • Department: Anti Narcotics Force (ANF)
  • Year: 2026
  • Posts: SI, ASI, Constable, Driver, Clerical
  • Process: Physical Test → Written Test → Interview

Roll Number Slip Details

The roll number slip contains your name, CNIC, test date, time, and test center. You must bring a printed copy on test day.

How to Download Slip

  1. Go to ANF official website
  2. Open roll number slip section
  3. Enter your CNIC
  4. Click submit
  5. Download and print your slip

Important Instructions

  • Bring original CNIC
  • Reach on time
  • Wear proper dress for physical test
  • Mobile phones are not allowed

Preparation Tips

  • Prepare running and exercise
  • Study general knowledge
  • Practice past papers
  • Prepare for interview

FAQs

When will slip be available?
After application closing date.

Is it necessary?
Yes, it is required for entry.

Can I get it by post?
No, only online download is available.

Conclusion

Download your ANF roll number slip on time and check all details carefully to avoid problems on test day.
